chunks.text: Prabal Dutta, Professor of Electrical Engineering and Computer Sciences at UC Berkeley, has been awarded the Distinguished Alumni Award for Academic Excellence from the College of Engineering at The Ohio State University. This award honors alumni who have demonstrated significant achievement in academia through contributions to teaching, research, or education.

Dutta earned a B.S. in Electrical and Computer Engineering (’97) and an M.S. in Electrical Engineering (’04) from The Ohio State University. He went on to earn his Ph.D. in Computer Science from UC Berkeley in 2009.
His research spans computer architecture and engineering, cyber-physical systems, design automation, energy, and operating systems and networking.
